ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and aligns with the persona, but could improve in naturalness as it sounds a bit too formal for an NPC merchant.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>Lacks both relevance to context and consistency with Merchant persona, also lacks in naturalness due to the formality of language used for a NPC merchant.
